summary.title: Group builds by month and simplify rows
changes: Builds in the "What's New" list are grouped into calendar-month sections, newest month first.
Each build row now shows the build date and the short commit SHA.
Unseen-build tracking now uses exact build SHAs and preserves that state when the view loads.
Build summaries show up to three items and display a "+N more" indicator when there are extra titles.
